gaps.evidence_in_top_quartile: Top-quartile data infra peers (Databricks-native shops) use Feast or Tecton for real-time feature serving at scale.
gaps.evidence_at_prospect: StreamlineOps uses Airflow + dbt for batch pipelines but no evidence of a real-time feature store in job postings.
gaps.gap_insight: Peer leaders in data infrastructure have moved to real-time feature serving; StreamlineOps' batch-only approach creates a latency gap for time-sensitive analytics.
